name: tutorial-steps-visual
description: Step-by-step visual walkthrough of all 23 tutorial steps (0-22) with per-step screenshots for visual regression testing. Exercises the tutorial overlay from start through congratulations, capturing each step's UI state.

steps.description: Setup: create game with seed 42
Setup: start tutorial pit level
Step 0: Start tutorial overlay — time-speed guidance displayed
Step 0 complete: change time speed → advances to step 1 (hire-surveyor)
Step 1 complete: hire surveyor → advances to step 2 (survey)
Step 2 complete: seismic survey → advances to step 3 (hire-driller)
Step 3 complete: hire driller → advances to step 4 (drill-plan)

steps.command: drill_plan grid rows:3 cols:3 spacing:5 depth:8 start:15,15
steps.description: Step 4 complete: drill plan grid → advances to step 5 (charge)
Step 5 complete: set charges → advances to step 6 (sequence)
Step 6 complete: auto-sequence → advances to step 7 (blast)
Step 7 complete: execute blast → advances to step 8 (scores)
Step 8 complete: view scores → auto-advances to step 9 (event-fire-resolve)
Step 9: trigger event-fire-resolve — tutorial fires event, pending event appears
Resolve tutorial event → allows step 10 (hire-manager) to proceed
Step 10 complete: hire manager → advances to step 11 (contract-accept)
Step 11 complete: accept contract → advances to step 12 (hire-driver)
Step 12 complete: hire driver → advances to step 13 (vehicle-buy-assign)
Step 13: buy vehicle (tutorial auto-buys, also buy manually for driver assignment)
Step 13 complete: assign driver to vehicle → advances to step 14 (build-storage)
Step 14 complete: build freight warehouse → advances to step 15 (contract-deliver)
Step 15 complete: deliver to contract → advances to step 16 (finances)
Step 16 complete: view finances → auto-advances to step 17 (build-ramp)
Step 17: view needs → tutorial auto-builds ramp, advances to step 18 (needs)
Step 18: advance time — needs display shown, auto-advances to step 19 (set-policy)
Step 19 complete: change site policy → advances to step 20 (tick-advance)
Step 20 complete: advance time 10 ticks → advances to step 21 (victory)
Step 21 complete: force-complete level → advances to step 22 (congratulations)
Step 22: congratulations displayed — tutorial auto-dismisses after display
